response:
The Hive is a full world of NPC agents, built for the mission. 21 brothers strong, across 7 families: 
• **Governance**: Enforcing the LeeWay Standards.
• **Standards**: Maintaining the 5W+H identity.
• **MCP**: Bridging VS Code and external tools natively.
• **Integrity**: Guardian of structural soundness.
• **Security**: The Guard Corps protecting your terrain.
• **Discovery**: Mapping the architecture of your builds.
• **Orchestration**: Led by me, coordinating the rhythm.

We're designed to cover every profession and idea, from local edge devices to big corporations, all connected through the Hive Mind without needing any transformer—unless we choose to use one as a tool.
